locations_inspected.name: Hill Country Hospitality Partners, LLC
findings: Estimated Remaining Useful Life: 7 years (overall) / 0 years (roof)
Roof Deck Attachment: B - Nails (6" o.c.)
deficiencies: Multiple areas of ponding water observed on flat roof sections
Visible roof deck sagging and water damage
Electrical panel clearance obstructed by stored materials
Hood suppression system in kitchen area has expired inspection
Exterior lighting inadequate in parking area
HVAC rooftop units show signs of deferred maintenance
Hot work permit program not formally documented

recommendations.description: Visible roof deck sagging and water damage indicates structural concerns; engage structural engineer for immediate assessment; restrict access to affected areas pending evaluation
Electrical panel clearance obstructed by stored materials; maintain minimum 36-inch clearance in front of all electrical panels per NEC Article 110.26
Hood suppression system in kitchen area has expired inspection; complete annual inspection of kitchen hood suppression system per NFPA 96 Section 12.2
Exterior lighting inadequate in parking area and loading dock; add additional lighting to maintain minimum 1 foot-candle at ground level in all exterior areas
HVAC rooftop units show signs of deferred maintenance; establish quarterly preventive maintenance program for all mechanical equipment
Hot work permit program not formally documented; implement written hot work permit program per NFPA 51B; train all affected personnel

overall_assessment.summary: Property inspection identified severe roof deficiencies including structural sagging and ponding water, along with several fire protection, electrical, and maintenance concerns requiring corrective action.
